title: Run VQA pass for narrative clarity
goal: Validate that the story-site draft is emotionally clear, readable, and trustworthy for the target audience.

steps.text: Review latest QA output and revised story-site draft.
Evaluate tone, readability, and trust signals for a non-technical reader.
Record narrative quality findings and required revisions.
Approve for customer share only after critical clarity issues are resolved.

acceptanceCriteria: VQA report captures clarity and tone findings
Critical clarity issues are resolved or explicitly blocked

verification.text: Confirm VQA decision is documented with rationale
